page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz, providing 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance ranking in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU scores, and Geekbench multi-core metrics fall within the average tier. Memory bandwidth tests show average read performance at 518.66 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 39.27 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, though large block write bandwidth is relatively weak at 18.99 GB/sec. Cryptographic and vector operations are supported via hardware-accelerated instructions including AES, VAES, SHA_NI, and AVX.

Given its balanced resource allocation and dedicated CPU cores, the ecs.g7a.2xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring consistent processing power without extreme memory or storage demands. The instance is appropriate for general-purpose applications, static web serving, redis caching, and moderate database operations. It can also handle lightweight machine learning tasks, such as text generation with smaller 135M parameter models, though performance drops significantly for larger models.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring an x86_64 AMD EPYC 7T83 processor with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at 2.55 GHz. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU performance, while multi-core processing, memory read bandwidth, and web serving throughput remain in the average tier. However, large block memory write bandwidth is a notable bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25%. This instance is appropriate for general-purpose workloads, including static web serving, redis caching, and database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, delivering strong single-core and average multi-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and KVM-based virtualization.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and strong single-core performance for standard enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an 8-core AMD EPYC 7T83 processor at 2.55 GHz
Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core) and no local storage
Delivers strong single-core CPU performance in the top 25%
Features a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps
Appropriate for static web serving, redis caching, and database operations
